title: Core Concepts Path
description: Build fluency in Core Concepts inside Foundations by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
steps.summary: ** Artificial Intelligence (AI) belongs to the Foundations area of AI/ML, within Core Concepts. It sits inside Foundations / Core Concepts. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Core Concepts — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.
